title: Probability without heavy grammar
subtitle: Use quizá, a lo mejor, tal vez.
overview: A2 can express probability without complex forms.
A lo mejor + indicative is very common in speech.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Maybe it will rain this afternoon.

items.es: A lo mejor voy al centro mañana.
items.en: Maybe I will go downtown tomorrow.
Maybe Ana does not have time.

items.es: Tal vez el restaurante está cerrado.
Probablemente vamos a tomar el autobús.
items.en: We will probably take the bus.

items.es: A lo mejor es mejor esperar.
items.en: Maybe it is better to wait.
